problems_encountered.description: Not executed: Highly destructive operation requiring explicit user permission. Revoking the only membership (Owner role) would permanently lock user out of organization. Per safety guidelines, destructive operations require explicit permission.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed due to destructive nature. Would require explicit user permission and test membership.
execution_notes: Skipped execution per safety guidelines. This tool revokes memberships (DELETE operation) and requires: (1) Explicit user permission for destructive operations, (2) A test membership or non-critical membership to avoid locking out users. Recommend creating a test user membership first, then revoking that test membership for proper eval.
